productName: Zoots - Gummies - REST - CBN 2:1 - Passion Fruit Orange Guava
description: Lush sweet, juicy orange gummies made with a chef’s touch — vivid fruit flavor, a melt-into-chew texture, and a cannabis infusion blended cleanly into every bite. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 2:1 ratio. Expect a smooth hybrid edible experience — give it time to bloom before taking more.
